user.title: Set up Home Assistant Telemetry
user.description: Enter the data_hub API URL, your enrollment token, and the entities to share. Example: https://hub.example.com

reauth.title: Refresh hub credentials
reauth.description: Enter the same Hub API URL and a fresh enrollment token to rotate the broker credentials for this site.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure telemetry settings
reconfigure.description: Update the Hub API URL and local entity selection for this site.

error.cannot_connect: Enrollment succeeded, but Home Assistant could not connect to the MQTT broker returned by the hub.
error.cannot_reach_hub: Could not reach the hub API URL. Check the URL, DNS, firewall, and reverse proxy configuration.
error.hub_rejected_enrollment: The hub rejected the enrollment request.
error.hub_request_failed: The hub request failed before enrollment could complete.
error.hub_timeout: Timed out waiting for the hub to respond.
error.invalid_enrollment_response: The hub returned an invalid enrollment response.
error.invalid_enrollment_token: The enrollment token is invalid, expired, revoked, or already used.
error.invalid_hub_url: Enter the full hub API URL, including http:// or https://.
error.unsupported_entity_selection: One or more selected entities are not supported.
error.unsupported_mqtt_transport: The hub returned an unsupported MQTT transport. This integration supports MQTT over TLS on TCP only.

abort.already_configured: This site ID is already configured.
